meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve Project Scaling
content.seo_description: Master Git with AI to break the freelancer scaling ceiling. A technical checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade code faster.
content.answer_block: To scale as a freelancer, you must move from manual coding to AI-assisted architectural orchestration. By integrating Git version control with Claude Code’s reasoning and Antigravity’s structural generation, you automate boilerplate, enforce consistent patterns, and treat your codebase as a repeatable product rather than a series of one-off tasks.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client list is growing, and your velocity has hit a brick wall. You are trapped in the 'custom-build cycle,' where every new project feels like starting from scratch because your codebase lacks the structural integrity to scale. The bottleneck isn't your coding ability; it's your inability to replicate success across multiple repositories.

But what if you could treat every project like a modular assembly line? By pairing the raw architectural power of Antigravity with the autonomous reasoning of Claude Code, you can transform Git from a simple version tracker into a high-octane engine for automated delivery. It is time to stop writing code and start orchestrating systems.

steps.title: Architecting the Base Structure
steps.description: Establish a robust project scaffold that mandates modularity, ensuring that future scaling is a feature, not an afterthought.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular, scalable project structure for a SaaS application including shared utilities, domain-driven design, and strict TypeScript configurations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with domain-driven design structure'

steps.title: Automating Git Workflow Integration
steps.description: Configure Claude Code to handle branch management and commit message standards automatically, ensuring high-quality history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a Git hook configuration that enforces Conventional Commits and links every PR to an automated status check.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure husky hooks for automated commit linting'

steps.title: Context-Aware Codebase Refactoring
steps.description: Use AI to analyze existing patterns and refactor technical debt into reusable components to speed up future builds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing component library and extract shared logic into a decoupled 'core-utils' package.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor legacy logic into isolated utility modules'

steps.title: AI-Driven Feature Implementation
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to implement features by providing the architectural blueprint generated by Antigravity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer implementation for user authentication based on the project's established dependency injection pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication service using established patterns'

steps.title: Deployment and Verification Loop
steps.description: Automate the final verification and deployment pipeline to ensure every commit is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CI/CD pipeline configuration that runs unit tests, integration tests, and security audits before merging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup CI/CD pipeline with automated testing triggers'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'golden repository' template; use Antigravity to sync updates across all your client projects simultaneously.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store specific client coding styles to avoid repetitive prompting.
Treat your Git commit history as a documentation layer; prompt your AI to explain the 'why' behind complex architectural decisions in every commit message.
Implement a 'dry-run' phase where Claude Code reviews its own PRs before you ever touch the keyboard.
Leverage Git tags to version your AI-generated components, allowing you to roll back specific features without touching the entire codebase.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder for common patterns, then build your first 'Golden Template' using the Antigravity CLI.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with manual scaling and start shipping like an agency. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
